policy: Changes introduced after the canonical campaign are reviewed separately. They never replace the producer revision or silently alter the frozen score source.

patches.rationale: Normalize pandas-inferred cached CountQA answers back to the string representation produced by a fresh fetch, preserving preparation and generation manifest identity. The focused test proves null, integer, and whitespace behavior without rescoring the paper runs.

Expose a local build-only archive operation that neither reads a token nor contacts Hugging Face. The public adaptation must use neutral trace_eval naming and retain only new-run publication behavior.

Forward optional mm-processor-kwargs and generation-config arguments only when explicitly configured. Their unset defaults preserve the producer launch behavior; any enabled invocation is bound by the recorded public code and campaign fingerprints.
Globally enabling Pillow truncated-image tolerance changes server decoding behavior. It is excluded unless a separate benchmark-specific necessity and invariance review is completed.

Private repository migration, re-emission, and recovery remain outside the canonical 24-benchmark public interface. TRACE validation is released as a separately pinned workflow and result source; it does not change the trace_eval_v1 producer revision or scores.
